meta.title: Historical Geostrategic Atlas pilot
meta.orientation_geometry: Natural Earth 1:110m modern generalized country geometry
meta.orientation_caveat: Modern generalized geometry is used only for spatial orientation. Historical names and status come from dated project records; historical borders are not yet reconstructed.

layers.title: FRUS activity
layers.value_semantics: Linked pilot FRUS records whose volume span includes the selected year.
layers.caveat: Record count measures indexed documentary coverage, not diplomatic importance or policy intensity.

layers.title: Documented access relationships
layers.value_semantics: Lines connect the United States to a country named in a linked negotiation, agreement, or FRUS pathway.
layers.caveat: Line width represents linked pilot records, not shipment volume, import dependence, or strategic importance.

layers.title: Treaties and policy instruments
layers.value_semantics: Dated or FRUS-volume-dated pilot agreements and policy instruments linked to a country.
layers.caveat: A marker does not imply that the record is a formal treaty. Record type and date precision remain visible.

layers.title: Strategic stockpile policy
layers.value_semantics: Pilot stockpile planning episodes and statutory pathways located at country-level U.S. geography.
layers.caveat: Markers represent policy geography, not storage sites, holdings, acquisitions, or releases.

layers.title: Historical episodes
layers.value_semantics: Countries linked to a pilot historical episode during its documented date range.
layers.caveat: Episode coverage is selective and does not define the full geography of a war or crisis.

layers.title: NARA archival discovery
layers.value_semantics: Structured NARA Catalog query plans that include the selected country, mineral, and year.
layers.caveat: Query plans are archival leads. They are not reviewed catalog results and the site stores no API response content.

layers.title: Resource geography
layers.value_semantics: Country-level links between pilot mineral profiles and country records.
layers.caveat: This layer shows evidence associations, not production, reserves, mines, or supplier rank.

layers.title: Mineral production
layers.required_data: Country, mineral, year, mine or refined basis, value, unit, official table/page, and source URL.
layers.caveat: The checked-in USGS pilot contains U.S. and world totals, not a compatible country-by-year production series.

layers.title: U.S. import supplier share
layers.required_data: Country, mineral, year, import definition, quantity or value, denominator, unit, classification, and official citation.
layers.caveat: No country-supplier share is calculated from the current aggregate import series.

layers.title: Partner-country quantitative trade flows
layers.required_data: Origin, destination, mineral or product code, year, flow, quantity/value, unit, classification, and official citation.
layers.caveat: The U.S. Trade tab provides cited national totals. This map layer remains locked until official origin-destination data can support bilateral flows; documented access lines must not be interpreted as trade volume.

layers.title: Mines, smelters, ports, and routes
layers.required_data: Feature name, type, active dates, coordinates or geometry, precision, ownership/status where relevant, and official citation.
layers.caveat: Country centroids are never presented as facility or route coordinates.

layers.title: Alliances and historical boundaries
layers.required_data: Year-bounded membership and historically reviewed boundary geometry with source and territorial-status notes.
layers.caveat: The orientation basemap uses modern generalized geometry and is not evidence for historical borders or alliance membership.

layers.title: Strategic risk
layers.required_data: Published methodology plus sourced supplier concentration, import dependence, substitution, stockpile, and disruption variables for a common year.
layers.caveat: The portal does not convert record counts or editorial judgments into a quantitative vulnerability score.
